response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience with C++ and has worked on various projects, but lacks direct experience in industrial automation and cloud platform solutions.
strengths: Proven C++ development experience at National Instruments
Strong background in software development with diverse technologies
Experience with various programming languages and technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in industrial automation
No clear experience with cloud platform solutions
Not directly familiar with IEC 62443 industrial-cybersecurity standards
